response.original_title: Hamilius: Hip Hop Culture in Luxembourg
response.overview: The history of Hip Hop in Luxembourg. 3 generations (the 80s, 90s and 2000s) and 4 disciplines (Dancing, Writing, Emceeing and Deejaying) to relate the history of Hip Hop culture in a country that is mainly known for its Banks and its nice little lifestyle in the heart of Europe. The 'CENTER HAMILIUS' is the symbol of a providential State and a silent witness of this urban culture that has been often linked to violence and juvenile delinquency. Foremost we discover Luxembourg's youth, culturally, socially as well as its linguistic riches.
response.title: Hamilius: Hip Hop Culture in Luxembourg
